Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: One final note on controlling ships in formation: waypoints issued to the Formation Leader will cause the entire formation to follow, but waypoints given to other units within the formation will override their formation order.

Let's try this now by ordering the frigate Narvik to proceed in the opposite direction as Lütjens by selecting it and giving it a waypoint somewhere off to the east. Use time compression to watch what happens as Narvik leaves its station and moves to the new waypoint you have given it.
